---
title: "Hi, I'm Armelle Ballian"
about:
  id: template-area
  template: jolla
  image: profile.png
  links:
    - icon: bluesky
      text: bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/armelleballian.bsky.social
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/armelleblln
    - icon: book
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=aId4LewAAAAJ&hl=fr
    - icon: mouse
      text: Current position
      href: https://uni-tuebingen.de/en/fakultaeten/mathematisch-naturwissenschaftliche-fakultaet/fachbereiche/geowissenschaften/arbeitsgruppen/geo-und-umweltnaturwissenschaften/geo-und-umweltnaturwissenschaften/climatology-and-the-biosphere/workgroup/team/armelle-ballian/
    - icon: person-vcard
      text: Contact
      href: https://vcard.link/card/Dm8n.vcf
---
[comment]:  (Tasks for this page
Update the YAML header. you can check out different layouts of the pre-formatted part at <https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html#templates>
Update the legal information
Write a short introduction set of you
delete this section)

I am currently postdoc in Tübingen (Germany) at the Geo- and Environmental Research Centre (GUZ) in the Climatology and the Biosphere group. 
This website showcases my research, publications, and teaching activities.

## Fields of specialization
Continental paleoclimate and paleoenvironmental dynamics, surface processes, geomorphology, stable isotope paleoaltimetry, terrestrial carbonates and paleosols, fault gouges, karst systems and cave climate monitoring, stable isotope geochemistry (δ^13^C, δ^17^O, δ^18^O, δ^2^H), carbonate clumped (∆~47) isotope thermometry.

:::
## Contact

I'd be happy to connect regarding research, collaborations, or teaching opportunities.

 ✉️ **Email:** armelle.ballian@uni-tuebingen.de
☎️ **Tel:** +49 7071 29 72492
📍 **Address:** Eberhard Karls University Tübingen, Geo- and Environmental Research Center, Schnarrenbergstraße 94-96, D-72076 Tuebingen, Germany

:::

## News

**April 2026:** Presented my current work at EGU26 in Vienna.
**March 2026:** Successfully defended my PhD thesis.

---


--------
Below are some pictures from the fieldwork carried out during my Master’s, PhD and postdoc. 
Ci-dessous des souvenirs du travail de terrain effectué pendant mon Master, mon doctorat et mon postdoc.
---
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Falkensteiner Höhle, Germany](ArmelleFalki.jpg)
*Falkensteiner Höhle, Swabian Alb (2025) *


![Armantes section, Central Spain](pic2.jpg)
*Armantes section, Central Spain (2022)*

![Mölltal Valley, Austria](pic4.jpg)
*Mölltal Valley, Austria (2021)*
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
![Digne Valensole basin, SE France](pic1.jpeg)
*Digne Valensole basin, SE France | Sampling pedogenic carbonate nodules (2021)*

![Chanthaburi Region, Thailand](pic3.jpg)
*Chanthaburi, Thailand | Excavating beach ridges (2019) ©J. Miocic*

![Chanthaburi Region, Thailand](pic5.jpg)
*Chanthaburi, Thailand | Excavating beach ridges (2019) ©S. Chawchai*
::: 





---
